question.label: Core message miss
question.name: When you lose the core message, what are you missing in the brief?
question.description: Drills into the specific clarity failure he named before moving on.

answer: I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.

assessment.note: He names a specific absence — clear examples of excellent junior-level work — which is a strong clarity gap; also hints at growth support being underprovided.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Growth blocker
new_queue.name: What is making growth feel stuck for you right now?

new_queue.label: Practice commitment
new_queue.name: What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
